ValidationRule.description: Number of Users must be between 10 - 500. Only for Polaris M365
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: NOT(ISBLANK(Number_of_Users__c)) && ( Number_of_Users__c < 10 || Number_of_Users__c > 500 ) && INCLUDES( Product_Categories__c , 'Polaris M365')
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Number of Users must be between 10 - 500
